title: Netherite with Daimond
description: Adds A Diamond Trim To All Netherite Armor And Tools
body:
This texture pack is inspired by Philza netherite armor and tools so i recommend checking out his texture pack 
(I have not taken any of Philza textures!!!)

This texture pack adds a diamond trim to all netherite armor, tools and horse armor

I made this pack because i personally i dont like the normal textures of netherite armor but then i saw Phihza netherite armor and then i made this texture pack so if you dont like the normal texture of netherite give this texture pack a try

List of All Trimed Items
- Netherite Sword
- Netherite Spear
- Netherite Pickaxe
- Netherite Axe
- Netherite Shovel
- Netherite Hoe
- Netherite Helmet
- Netherite Chestplate
- Netherite leggings
- Netherite Boots
- Netherite Horse Armor
